summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of GitHub Portfolio Audit Dashboard. All core features working perfectly including dashboard loading, portfolio summary display, strategic insights, action plans, repository cards with metrics, filtering, sorting, and expand/collapse functionality.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with audit summary
Portfolio Summary card displays 8 repositories, 65.5MB total, 75% avg potential
Strategic Insights section renders with BGaming- highest potential highlighted
Prioritized Action Plan shows P0 (2), P1 (2), P2 (2), P3 (2) items
Repository Analysis section displays all 8 repo cards
Each repo card shows all 4 meters: potential, revenue, complexity, scalability
Category filter buttons work for all 9 categories (All, gambling, affiliate-tools, marketplace, casino-infrastructure, game-server, educational, unknown, personal)
Sort dropdown works correctly (by Potential, Revenue, Name)
View Full Analysis expand/collapse works on repo cards with detailed content
GitHub profile link works in header with correct URL and new tab opening
Individual repo GitHub links work with correct URLs and new tab opening
Expanded content shows Key Features, Tech Stack, Unique Selling Points, and Timeline
Portfolio summary shows correct primary focus and revenue potential
Strategic insights sections all present and functional
